overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through the neon-lit streets of Night City, transitioning from a covered walkway under an elevated highway to the open plaza of the Night City Police Department.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the overpass, passing closed storefronts

notable_agents.action: person in light-colored jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete pillars and exposed metal beams forming the highway overpass overhead
closed corrugated metal security shutters on shop fronts with red neon accents
glowing red and cyan neon signs for various storefronts along the left wall
dark colored cars with bright headlights driving along the street to the right

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath a massive concrete overpass in a cyberpunk city, the scene is illuminated by vibrant neon signs lining the left wall while vehicles pass by on the right. The atmosphere is dense with urban infrastructure and glowing advertisements.

events.description: turns right and exits the covered walkway into an open intersection with tall buildings
crosses the red-painted pedestrian crosswalk while vehicles wait at the intersection

agents.ego_description: turns right at the intersection and crosses the street, navigating around barriers

notable_agents.action: white futuristic sedan driving through the intersection with headlights on

entered.detail: large building facade with glowing white mask-like advertisement on red background
yellow metal barriers separating the pedestrian walkway from the street
white canopy umbrellas at an outdoor seating area across the street

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the camera turns right into a bustling intersection dominated by a massive red digital billboard. Yellow guardrails line the path as the character crosses a red-painted crosswalk, with a white futuristic car passing by.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with vending machines and arcade games

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past various storefronts, vending machines, and arcade games

entered.detail: red and black automated vending machines with glowing 'BUY NOW' displays
retro-style arcade cabinets with bright screens and 'BIG' text visible
tall palm trees lining the street against the dark sky
large vertical digital billboards displaying animated advertisements

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the commercial sidewalk, the path is lined with glowing vending machines and arcade cabinets on the left, while palm trees and large digital billboards rise on the right. The street maintains a steady cyberpunk aesthetic with scattered litter and neon reflections.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to major intersection with police department

events.description: passes a pedestrian sitting on a concrete bench on the right side

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection near the large illuminated '10' sign and police department

notable_agents.action: woman in athletic wear and red cap walking toward the camera

entered.detail: tall building with large vertical digital sign displaying the number 10 in bright white
illuminated signage reading 'Night City Police Department' on the building facade
black police cars with glowing blue accents and emergency lights

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the camera approaches a major intersection dominated by a massive illuminated '10' sign. The Night City Police Department building becomes visible in the distance with police vehicles parked nearby, while palm trees now line the left side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: Night City Police Department plaza entrance

events.description: enters the plaza area of the Night City Police Department with open concrete space

agents.ego_description: walking into the police department plaza, approaching the main entrance

notable_agents.action: group of police officers and civilians gathered near the entrance

entered.detail: large modern building with blue metallic facade and 'Night City Police Department' signage
large circular planters containing palm trees in the plaza area
small booth structure with pink and blue neon lighting near the entrance

segments.scene_description: Entering the open plaza of the Night City Police Department, the camera moves toward the modern blue building facade. Potted palm trees dot the concrete plaza while a group of people gather near a neon-lit kiosk, marking the end of the journey through the neon-soaked streets.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the claustrophobic shadows of an urban overpass into the wide, illuminated plaza of a police headquarters. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass where vibrant neon signs and passing vehicles create a dense atmosphere of urban infrastructure. As the camera exits the covered walkway, the scene opens into a bustling intersection dominated by a massive red digital billboard and red-painted crosswalks. The path then shifts along a commercial sidewalk lined with glowing vending machines and arcade cabinets before expanding toward a major intersection marked by a towering illuminated sign. Finally, the camera moves past palm trees and parked police vehicles to enter the open concrete plaza of the Night City Police Department, approaching a modern blue facade and a neon-lit kiosk.
